---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Summary**
Short description of the feature.

**Motivation**
Why this would be useful (e.g. for ingestion, graph build, retrieval).

**Proposed design**
How it could work (APIs, services, config).

**Alternatives**
Other approaches you considered.

**Additional context**
Links, references, or mockups.
